title: Crispy Portuguese Crumble Bites
description: A tasty snack or appetizer combining crunchy Portuguese ingredients with a savory crumble topping.

ingredients.name: Savory Cheese
ingredients.notes: any savory cheese like cheddar or parmesan

instructions: In a large bowl, combine crushed Portuguese chips, crushed crisp savory biscuits, and savory crumble mix.
In a separate bowl, mix together shredded savory cheese and melted butter.
Add the cheese mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
Beat an egg in a small bowl and use it as an egg wash.
Scoop the mixture into small balls and flatten them slightly.
Brush the tops with the egg wash.
Place the balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
